links.title: ← Back to Overview
links.tooltip: Return to main dashboard with map

targets.rawSql:
SELECT p.voltage as "Battery"
FROM block_power_status p
WHERE p.sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'battery'
  AND $__timeFilter(p.ts)
ORDER BY p.ts DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT p.voltage as "Mains"
FROM block_power_status p
WHERE p.sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'mains'
  AND $__timeFilter(p.ts)
ORDER BY p.ts DESC
LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(temperature, -1) AS "Temperature" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'
SELECT COALESCE(cpu_load, -1) AS "CPU" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'
SELECT COALESCE(disk_usage_pct, -1) AS "Disk" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'
SELECT COALESCE(satellites_tracked, -1) AS "Satellites" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT gps_sats AS "GPS", glonass_sats AS "GLO", galileo_sats AS "GAL", beidou_sats AS "BDS"
FROM station_dashboard_data
WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT
  CASE overall_status
    WHEN 'healthy' THEN 0
    WHEN 'warning' THEN 1
    WHEN 'critical' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END AS status,
  CASE
    WHEN overall_status = 'healthy' THEN 'All systems OK'
    WHEN COALESCE(status_details, '') = '' THEN 'Check file/port status'
    ELSE status_details
  END AS details
FROM station_dashboard_data
WHERE station_id = '$station'

panels.title: Overall Status
panels.description: Details field shows what is causing non-healthy status (e.g. 'Voltage, FTP down')

targets.rawSql: SELECT uptime_seconds AS "Uptime" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN d.ip_address IS NOT NULL THEN host(d.ip_address) || ':' || COALESCE(d.station_http_port, 80)::text
    ELSE ''
  END AS url,
  CASE
    WHEN d.ip_address IS NOT NULL THEN host(d.ip_address) || ':' || COALESCE(d.station_http_port, 80)::text || ' (' || COALESCE(d.receiver_type, '?') || ')'
    ELSE COALESCE(d.receiver_type, 'Unknown')
  END AS "Receiver",
  CASE
    WHEN d.latitude IS NOT NULL THEN
      ROUND(d.latitude::numeric, 4)::text || ', ' || ROUND(d.longitude::numeric, 4)::text
    ELSE 'No coordinates'
  END AS "Location"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
WHERE d.station_id = '$station'
SELECT COALESCE(seconds_since_update, 0) AS "Checked" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM d.state_duration)::integer, 0) AS "online"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
WHERE d.station_id = '$station' AND d.is_online = true

SELECT COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM d.state_duration)::integer, 0) AS "offline"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
WHERE d.station_id = '$station' AND d.is_online = false

SELECT
  CASE WHEN ftp_port IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN ftp_open THEN ftp_port ELSE 0 END AS "FTP",
  CASE WHEN health_http_port IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN http_open THEN health_http_port ELSE 0 END AS "HTTP",
  CASE WHEN control_port IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN control_open THEN control_port ELSE 0 END AS "Ctrl"
FROM station_dashboard_data
WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT
  (SELECT CASE
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='15s_24hr' AND status='downloaded') THEN -1
    ELSE (SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - (file_date + INTERVAL '1 day')))
          FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='15s_24hr'
          AND status='downloaded' ORDER BY file_date DESC LIMIT 1)
  END) AS "24h",
  (SELECT CASE
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='1Hz_1hr' AND status='downloaded') THEN -1
    ELSE (SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - (file_date + file_hour * INTERVAL '1 hour')))
          FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='1Hz_1hr'
          AND status='downloaded' ORDER BY file_date DESC, file_hour DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1)
  END) AS "1Hz",
  (SELECT CASE
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='status_1hr' AND status='downloaded') THEN -1
    ELSE (SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - (file_date + file_hour * INTERVAL '1 hour')))
          FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='status_1hr'
          AND status='downloaded' ORDER BY file_date DESC, file_hour DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1)
  END) AS "Status"

SELECT
  (SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='15s_24hr' AND status='downloaded' AND file_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '2 days') THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) AS "15s",
  (SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='1Hz_1hr' AND status='downloaded' AND file_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) AS "1Hz",
  (SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='status_1hr' AND status='downloaded' AND file_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) AS "Status"

SELECT CASE ntrip_status
  WHEN 'connected' THEN 0
  WHEN 'connecting' THEN 1
  WHEN 'idle' THEN 2
  WHEN 'inactive' THEN 4
  WHEN 'error' THEN 3
  ELSE 2
END AS "RTK"
FROM station_dashboard_data
WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT
  ts AS time,
  voltage AS "Battery"
FROM block_power_status
WHERE sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'battery'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  ts AS time,
  voltage AS "Mains"
FROM block_power_status
WHERE sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'mains'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  p.ts AS "Time",
  p.voltage AS "Voltage",
  r.temperature AS "Temperature",
  r.cpu_load AS "CPU",
  d.usage_percent AS "Disk",
  sat.total AS "Satellites",
  hs.overall_status AS "Status"
FROM block_power_status p
LEFT JOIN block_receiver_status r ON p.sid = r.sid AND p.ts = r.ts
LEFT JOIN block_disk_status d ON p.sid = d.sid AND p.ts = d.ts
LEFT JOIN block_satellite_tracking sat ON p.sid = sat.sid AND p.ts = sat.ts
LEFT JOIN block_health_summary hs ON p.sid = hs.sid AND p.ts = hs.ts
WHERE p.sid = '$station'
  AND $__timeFilter(p.ts)
ORDER BY p.ts DESC
LIMIT 100

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS __value, 'All Stations' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT area_id AS __value, area_name || ' (' || area_type || ')' AS __text FROM station_areas ORDER BY __text

list.query: SELECT sid FROM stations ORDER BY sid

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE(power_type, 'battery') FROM stations WHERE sid = '$station'

list.query: SELECT COALESCE(power_type, 'battery') FROM stations WHERE sid = '$station'
